general: Bring photo ID and insurance card

fasting.description: Complete bowel prep as instructed. No solid food for 24 hours before procedure.

diet_restrictions.3_days_before: Avoid seeds, nuts, popcorn, raw vegetables
diet_restrictions.1_day_before: Clear liquids only - no red or purple liquids

transport.description: You MUST have someone drive you home due to sedation

medications.blood_thinners: Discuss with doctor - may need to stop temporarily

arrival.description: Arrive 30 minutes early for check-in and IV placement

bowel_prep.hydration: Drink plenty of clear fluids during prep
